name_th: 6035 Castle Guard
history: 1987 LEGO Castle set (Black Falcons) — a mounted guard on a black horse plus a sentry and a small tent (52 pieces, 2 minifigures).

name_th: อัศวินดำ
history: From set 6035 Castle Guard (1987). A Black Falcons knight with a black breastplate, grille helmet and black plume.
inspiration: Extracted from a set in the collection.

name_th: แบล็คฟอลคอน (นักธนู)
history: A Black Falcons archer from set 6103 Castle Mini Figures (1988). Black legs with red hips, chin-guard helmet and a quiver.
inspiration: A medieval castle soldier of the Black Falcons faction.

name_th: การ์ดเหยี่ยวดำ
history: A Black Falcons soldier from set 6103 Castle Mini Figures (1988). Black legs with red hips and a neck-protector helmet.
inspiration: A knight of the Black Falcons castle faction.

name_th: อัศวินสิงห์ พลธนู
history: A Crusader (Royal Knights / Lion Knights) from set 6103 (1988). Red legs with black hips and a chin-guard helmet.
inspiration: A knight of the Crusaders / Lion Knights castle faction.

name_th: ฟอเรสต์เตอร์ถุงเหรียญ
history: A Forestman from set 6103 (1988) — green outfit with a pouch, green cap with a yellow feather, and a quiver.
inspiration: Robin Hood's merry outlaws of the forest.

name_th: หัวหน้าฟอเรสต์เตอร์
history: A Forestman from set 6103 (1988) — red-collared green outfit with a brown cap and a red feather.
inspiration: Robin Hood's merry outlaws of the forest.

name_th: นักลักลอบ
history: A peasant from set 6103 Castle Mini Figures (1988) — blue legs, black hood and a delivery basket.
inspiration: A common villager of the medieval castle world.

name_th: กัปตันเรดเบียร์ด (Captain Roger)
history: Captain Redbeard (Captain Roger), leader of LEGO Pirates from the original 1989 theme — the first minifigure with a hook hand and peg leg. Black bicorne with skull and crossbones, gold-trimmed coat over a green shirt, and a colourful parrot.
inspiration: The definitive classic LEGO pirate captain.

name_th: 1974 Legoland Triple Pack
history: A 1989 Legoland value pack combining three sets (including the Forestmen Smuggler's Hayride).

name_th: ฟอเรสต์แมน (Forestmen)
history: A member of the Forestmen, the Robin Hood-style outlaws of LEGO Castle (early 1990s). Green tunic with red collar, a green cap with a yellow plume, and a bow.
inspiration: Robin Hood and his band of merry outlaws.

name_th: 6042 Dungeon Hunters
history: 1990 LEGO Castle set (Lion Knights) — a horse-drawn prison cart with a mounted knight and a captured prisoner (105 pieces, 3 minifigures).

name_th: อัศวินสิงโต (เกราะอก)
history: From set 6042 Dungeon Hunters (1990). A Lion Knight with armour over blue, dark-gray visor helmet and a red three-feather plume — the mounted knight.
inspiration: Extracted from a set in the collection.

name_th: ครูเสด (ขาน้ำเงิน)
history: From set 6042 Dungeon Hunters (1990). A Crusader / Lion Knight with blue legs and a dark-gray neck-protector helmet.
inspiration: Extracted from a set in the collection.

name_th: ฟอเรสต์แมน (หมวกน้ำตาล, ธนู)
history: From set 6042 Dungeon Hunters (1990) — a Forestman with a brown cap, red feather and quiver (the captured prisoner).
inspiration: Extracted from a set in the collection.

name_th: 6020 Magic Shop
history: 1993 LEGO Castle set (Dragon Knights) — Merlin the wizard's magic shop (47 pieces, 1 minifigure).

name_th: พ่อมดมาจิสโต
history: From set 6020 Magic Shop (1993). Majisto, the wizard of the LEGO Castle Dragon Knights, with a black cape and magic wand.
inspiration: Extracted from a set in the collection.

name_th: นายทหารอิมพีเรียล
history: An officer of the Imperial Soldiers (the blue-coated "Bluecoats") from LEGO Pirates, mid-1990s. Wears a black bicorne, gold epaulettes and a blue coat with white cross-belts.
inspiration: A Napoleonic-era naval officer who hunted pirates on the high seas.

name_th: 4806 Axe Cart
history: 2000 LEGO Castle set — a small axe/crossbow cart with a knight.

name_th: โจร (Knights Kingdom)
history: From set 4806 Axe Cart (2000). A robber/bandit of Knights Kingdom I wearing a black dragon helmet.
inspiration: Extracted from a set in the collection.

name_th: ราชามงกุฎ (ผ้าคลุม)
history: The king of the good faction in LEGO Castle's Fantasy Era (2007–2009). Wears a blue-and-gold royal tunic with a crown emblem, gold shoulder armour, a cape and an ornate crown. Appears in sets such as 7188 King's Carriage Ambush.
inspiration: A classic fairy-tale medieval king leading his knights into battle.

name_th: บัซ ไลต์เยียร์
history: Part of the LEGO Toy Story line (2010), released alongside the Toy Story 3 sets.
inspiration: Buzz Lightyear, the Space Ranger action figure from Pixar's Toy Story.

name_th: วู้ดดี้
history: Released in 2010 with LEGO's Toy Story theme.
inspiration: Sheriff Woody, the pull-string cowboy doll and Andy's favourite toy.

name_th: ฟาโรห์
history: Collectible Minifigures Series 2 (2010), an early CMF wave.
inspiration: An ancient Egyptian pharaoh in golden ceremonial regalia.

name_th: ชายชุดกอริลลา
history: Released in 2011 as part of LEGO Collectible Minifigures Series 3 (set 8803). The gorilla head is a removable mask that reveals a sweaty man's face underneath, and he comes with a banana.
inspiration: A person in a full gorilla costume — a playful nod to costumed mascots and the classic movie ape suit.

name_th: ราชินีอียิปต์
history: CMF Series 5 (set 8805, 2011).
inspiration: An Egyptian queen in the spirit of Cleopatra, complete with a pet snake.

name_th: มนุษย์กิ้งก่า
history: From LEGO Collectible Minifigures Series 5 (set 8805), released in 2011. Features a green reptilian head-hood with an alternate human face, a scaly muscular torso, plus a tail piece and a lizard-emblem shield.
inspiration: A green lizard/dino costume in the spirit of creature-feature monsters like Godzilla — a man dressed up as a reptilian beast.

name_th: ราชาสมุทร / โพไซดอน
history: Collectible Minifigures Series 7 (2012).
inspiration: A merman sea-king echoing Poseidon/Neptune, ruler of the oceans.

name_th: ชายชุดกระต่าย
history: From LEGO Collectible Minifigures Series 7 (set 8831), released in 2012. Comes with a carrot; the bunny hood has pink inner ears and reveals a cheerful face. One of the earliest and most beloved animal-costume figures.
inspiration: A person in a fluffy white bunny costume with a pink egg-shaped belly — an Easter-bunny mascot.

name_th: ชุดไก่
history: CMF Series 9 (set 71000, 2013); one of LEGO's most beloved costume figures.
inspiration: A super-fan wearing a full chicken mascot suit.

name_th: พ่อมด
inspiration: A classic fantasy wizard with a star-and-moon robe and crystal staff.

name_th: เพรซิเดนต์ บิสเนส
history: The LEGO Movie CMF Series (71004, 2014).
inspiration: Lord/President Business, the order-obsessed villain of The LEGO Movie.

name_th: ชุดฮอตดอก
history: CMF Series 13 (71008, 2015); an instant collector favourite.
inspiration: A cheerful man dressed as a hot dog in a bun.

name_th: ทหารอิมพีเรียล IV
history: An Imperial Soldier ('Bluecoat') from the 2015 LEGO Pirates relaunch — tall black shako hat, red epaulettes, and a blue coat with white cross-belts.
inspiration: A Napoleonic-era colonial soldier who hunted pirates.

name_th: ราชาคลาสสิก
inspiration: A medieval king with golden crown and ermine cape, nodding to LEGO Castle.

name_th: ชุดฉลาม
inspiration: A goofy guy poking out of a foam shark costume.

name_th: ราชินี
inspiration: A regal castle queen with crown and ermine-trimmed cape.

name_th: ชุดกล้วย
inspiration: A man in a giant banana suit.

name_th: เด็กชุดเพนกวิน
inspiration: A child bundled up in a penguin costume.

name_th: แคทแมน
history: The LEGO Batman Movie CMF Series 1 (71017, 2017).
inspiration: Catman, a campy clawed DC villain spoofed in the movie.

name_th: ชุดข้าวโพด
inspiration: A man dressed as an ear of corn on the cob.

name_th: แบทแมนเงือก
history: The LEGO Batman Movie CMF Series 2 (71020, 2018).
inspiration: A gag 'merman' Batman from the movie's wacky costume line-up.

name_th: ชุดมังกรแดง
history: CMF Series 18 (71021, 2018), the 40th-anniversary 'party' wave.
inspiration: A festive dragon costume.

name_th: ชุดพลุ (BANG)
inspiration: A 'BANG!' firework-rocket costume for celebrations.

name_th: ชุดกระบองเพชร
inspiration: A prickly cactus costume.

name_th: ปาร์ตี้ บานาน่า
history: Party Banana Juice Bar promo set (5005250, 2018).
inspiration: A dancing banana-suit guy with a boombox.

name_th: ชุดยีราฟ
history: The LEGO Movie 2 CMF (71023, 2019).
inspiration: A tall giraffe onesie costume.

name_th: ชุดสีเทียน
history: The LEGO Movie 2 CMF (71023, 2019).
inspiration: A colourful crayon costume.

name_th: ชุดแตงโม
history: The LEGO Movie 2 CMF (71023, 2019).
inspiration: A juicy watermelon-slice costume.

name_th: เฮดีส
history: LEGO Disney CMF Series 2 (71024, 2019).
inspiration: Hades, the blue-flamed lord of the Underworld from Disney's Hercules.

name_th: เฮอร์คิวลิส
history: LEGO Disney CMF Series 2 (71024, 2019).
inspiration: Hercules, the demigod hero of Disney's Hercules.

name_th: ชุดพิซซ่า
inspiration: A man dressed as a slice of pizza.

name_th: ชุดถั่วลันเตา
inspiration: A girl tucked inside a pea-pod costume.

name_th: ชุดลามา
inspiration: A fluffy llama costume.

name_th: นายกฯ ชุดข้าวโพด (Solomon Fleck)
history: LEGO Hidden Side / City figure (cty1222).
inspiration: Mayor Solomon Fleck in a corn-cob mascot suit from Hidden Side's town of Newbury.

name_th: เด็กชุดไก่ (ส้ม)
history: LEGO Build-A-Minifigure (BAM) station exclusive, 2022.
inspiration: A kid in a bright orange chick/chicken suit.

name_th: เจมส์ บอนด์ 007
history: LEGO Speed Champions 007 Aston Martin DB5 (76911, 2022).
inspiration: James Bond (Daniel Craig) in his tuxedo, from No Time to Die.

name_th: ชุดเค้ก/พาย
history: LEGO Build-A-Minifigure exclusive, 2022.
inspiration: A sweet slice-of-cake / pie costume.

name_th: โดมินิค โทเร็ตโต้
history: Speed Champions 1970 Dodge Charger R/T (76912, 2022).
inspiration: Dom Toretto, the family-first street racer of Fast & Furious.

name_th: 76911 Aston Martin DB5
history: LEGO Speed Champions 76911 (2022) — James Bond's Aston Martin DB5 from No Time to Die.

name_th: 76912 Dodge Charger R/T
history: LEGO Speed Champions 76912 (2022) — Dominic Toretto's 1970 Dodge Charger R/T from Fast & Furious.

name_th: ชุดไก่งวง
inspiration: A Thanksgiving turkey costume.

name_th: ชุดมังกรเขียว
inspiration: A green dragon costume, companion to earlier dragon suits.

name_th: ชุดป๊อปคอร์น
inspiration: A movie-night popcorn-bucket costume.

name_th: แบทแมน (Batman Returns 1992)
history: LEGO DC polybag 30653 (2023), a tribute build.
inspiration: Michael Keaton's Batman from Tim Burton's 1992 film Batman Returns.

name_th: ไบรอัน โอคอนเนอร์
history: Speed Champions 2 Fast 2 Furious Nissan Skyline GT-R (76917, 2023).
inspiration: Brian O'Conner, ex-cop turned racer in the Fast & Furious saga.

name_th: 76917 Nissan Skyline GT-R
history: LEGO Speed Champions 76917 (2023) — Brian O'Conner's Nissan Skyline GT-R from 2 Fast 2 Furious.

name_th: สาวชุดสตรอว์เบอร์รีเค้ก
history: LEGO Build-A-Minifigure exclusive, 2023.
inspiration: A girl in a strawberry-shortcake slice costume with tie-dye shirt.

name_th: ชุดสีเทียนม่วงแดง
history: LEGO Build-A-Minifigure exclusive, 2023.
inspiration: A bright magenta crayon costume.

name_th: อัศวินแวมไพร์
inspiration: A vampiric knight with bat-wing helm, bat shield and axe.

name_th: ราชาอัศวินม้า
history: LEGO Creator 3-in-1 Medieval Horse Knight Castle (31168, 2025).
inspiration: King of the new Horse Knights faction, reviving the Castle theme.

name_th: หนังสือ LEGO Minifigure: A Visual History
history: DK's 'LEGO Minifigure: A Visual History – Updated and Expanded' (2025) — a 304-page hardcover covering more than 2,500 minifigures made since 1978. Bundled with the exclusive Blacktron Astronaut minifigure.
inspiration: The definitive illustrated reference on the LEGO minifigure, from its 1978 debut to today.

name_th: นักบินอวกาศ Blacktron
history: Exclusive minifigure included with the DK book 'LEGO Minifigure: A Visual History – Updated and Expanded' (LEGO 5010069), released September 2025. The most detailed Blacktron Classic Space figure to date — printed legs, the yellow Blacktron 'triforce' emblem on the torso and legs, and the Blacktron 1 logo on the black helmet.
inspiration: The villainous Blacktron faction from LEGO's Classic Space era (late 1980s) — the sleek all-black astronauts that rivalled the Futuron spacemen.

name_th: ชุดนกยูง
history: CMF Series 28 (71051, 2026), the latest wave.
inspiration: A proud peacock costume with a fanned tail of feathers.

name_th: อัศวินม้า (ผ้าคลุมหัวน้ำเงิน)
history: A Horse Knight archer from the LEGO Creator 3-in-1 Medieval Horse Knight Castle (set 31168, 2025) — white surcoat with the blue horse-crest shield, a dark-blue hood, armed with a crossbow.
inspiration: The Horse Knights, the heroic faction of the 2025 Castle-style Creator set, led by the Horse Knight King.

name_th: อัศวินม้า (หมวกกันคอ)
history: A Horse Knight spearman from set 31168 (2025) — white horse-crest surcoat, a flat-silver conical helmet with a neck protector, armed with a spear.
inspiration: A man-at-arms of the Horse Knights, the heroic 2025 Castle faction led by the Horse Knight King.

name_th: อัศวินม้า (พู่น้ำเงิน + ผ้าคลุม)
history: The Horse Knight Champion from set 31168 (2025) — white horse-crest surcoat, a great helm with plume, a sword and the blue horse shield.
inspiration: The champion of the Horse Knights, the heroic 2025 Castle faction led by the Horse Knight King.

name_th: อัศวินมงกุฎ (บังหน้า)
history: A Crown Knight from LEGO Castle Fantasy Era (2007–2009) in silver scale-mail with a printed breastplate bearing the golden crown, a grille helmet and a sword.
inspiration: The Crown Knights — the King's army of Fantasy Era Castle, defending the realm against Skeletons and Trolls.

name_th: อัศวินมงกุฎ (หน้าไม้)
history: A Crown Knight foot soldier from Fantasy Era Castle in the blue-and-white quartered surcoat with the crown emblem, a broad-brim kettle helmet, armed with a crossbow.
inspiration: The common crossbowmen of the King's Crown Knights, manning the castle walls.

name_th: อัศวินมงกุฎ (พลหอก)
history: A Crown Knight spearman from Fantasy Era Castle — blue-and-white quartered surcoat with the crown emblem, a conical neck-protector helmet, armed with a spear and a blue crown shield.
inspiration: A pikeman of the King's Crown Knights, holding the line against the enemy.

name_th: อัศวินเหยี่ยวดำ (คลาสสิก)
history: The classic Black Falcons knight from vintage LEGO Castle (mid-1980s) — blue torso with the black falcon crest, black legs, a black neck-protector helmet, a sword and the iconic Black Falcon shield.
inspiration: The Black Falcons, one of the original LEGO Castle factions (1984), rivals of the Crusaders and Forestmen.

name_th: โจรสลัด เสื้อลายแดง-ดำ
history: Classic LEGO Pirates crew member with the iconic red-and-black striped shirt, black legs and an eyepatch, from the Pirates I era (Black Seas Barracuda crew).

name_th: โจรสลัด เสื้อคลุมน้ำเงิน
history: Pirate in a blue officer-style jacket with gold lacing and epaulettes over light-gray legs, eyepatch face, from the Pirates I era.

name_th: นายทหารอิมพีเรียล การ์ด
history: Red-coated Imperial Guards officer with a white cross-belt, gold epaulettes and a black bicorne with a red plume (Pirates II, Imperial Guards, 1992).

name_th: ราชาคาฮูกา (หน้ากากแดง)
history: King Kahuka, ruler of the Islanders, wearing his unique red tiki mask topped with a white plume (Pirates, Islanders, 1994).

name_th: ราชาชนเผ่า (ผมดำ เขาควาย)
history: Islander king variant with the black Islander hair-piece topped with white bull horns and a tribal-painted face (Pirates, Islanders, 1994).

name_th: ซานตาคลอส
history: LEGO Santa Claus from the 2017 City Advent Calendar (60155), with a reddish-brown gift sack. Red suit and hat, white beard, black belt with gold buckle.

name_th: อัศวินครูเสด (ตราสิงโต)
note: ตั้งใจใส่ซ้ำ — เจ้าของมี Crusader ตัวนี้ 2 ตัว (ซื้อเพิ่มอีกตัว ไม่ใช่ error)
history: Classic Castle Crusaders (Lion Knights) knight with a red torso bearing the golden lion crest, blue arms and legs, and a white classic helmet with neck protector (mid-1980s Castle era). The owner has two copies of this figure — a second one was purchased.

name_th: ไวลด์สไตล์ (ลูซี่)
history: Lucy, aka Wyldstyle, the Master Builder heroine of The LEGO Movie (2014). Black graffiti hoodie (hood down), teal-and-magenta streaked hair with side ponytail.

name_th: บัคโค (Sky Pirate)
history: Bucko, a Sky Pirate from Ninjago: Skybound (2016). Green cap, orange face paint and beard, eyepatch, steampunk pirate outfit with hook hand.

name_th: ชุดพริก
history: Chili Costume Fan from Collectible Minifigures Series 22 (2022) — a red chili-pepper suit with a green stem and a sweating face peeking through.

name_th: กัปตันเรดเบิร์ด (บาราคูดา เบย์ 2020)
history: Captain Redbeard from the 2020 LEGO Ideas set 21322 Pirates of Barracuda Bay. Detailed brown leather coat over a green cravat, orange beard, eyepatch, peg leg and hook hand.

name_th: หนุ่มเค้กวันเกิด
history: Birthday Cake Guy from Collectible Minifigures Series 18 (Party, 2018) — a party host in a light-blue tux and gold party hat standing inside a large birthday cake.

name_th: สาวกระถางดอกไม้
history: Flowerpot Girl from Collectible Minifigures Series 18 (Party, 2018) — a pink-flower head with green stem body standing in a terracotta flowerpot.

name_th: กัปตันเรดเบิร์ด (บาราคูดา เบย์ 2020)
note: ตัวที่ 2 (ซ้ำแบบตั้งใจ) — เจ้าของมี Redbeard เวอร์ชัน Barracuda Bay 2 ตัว
history: Captain Redbeard from 21322 Pirates of Barracuda Bay (2020). Second copy owned by the collector.

name_th: พ่อมด อับราคา-ดาร์โก (BAM)
history: BAM exclusive Wizard (Q2 2022): blue starry robe, gray hair, brown shawl, keys and pouch, holding a tan owl.

name_th: เจ้าหญิง (Medieval BAM)
note: BAM Medieval The Princess — kimono dress, shuriken necklace, crown
history: The Princess from the Medieval Build-A-Minifigure trio: magenta kimono gown, teal/purple sash, koi print, shuriken necklace, gold crown.

name_th: ไอรอนแมน (Mark 64)
note: มินิฟิกแถมจากหนังสือ LEGO Marvel Visual Dictionary
history: Exclusive Iron Man (Mark 64) minifigure included with the LEGO Marvel Visual Dictionary (2023).

name_th: ดาร์ธ มอล (25 ปี)
note: มินิฟิกแถมจากหนังสือ LEGO Star Wars Visual Dictionary Updated Edition
history: Exclusive Darth Maul minifigure (25 Years of LEGO Star Wars back print) from the LEGO Star Wars Visual Dictionary Updated Edition (2024).

name_th: หนังสือ LEGO Marvel Visual Dictionary
note: มาพร้อมมินิฟิก Iron Man (Mark 64) พิเศษ
history: DK LEGO Marvel Visual Dictionary (2023, hardcover) — includes an exclusive Iron Man (Mark 64) minifigure.

name_th: หนังสือ LEGO Star Wars Visual Dictionary (Updated)
note: มาพร้อมมินิฟิก Darth Maul พิเศษ (25 ปี)
history: DK LEGO Star Wars Visual Dictionary Updated Edition (2024, hardcover, 25th anniversary) — includes an exclusive Darth Maul minifigure.

name_th: ชนเผ่าพื้นเมือง (ธนู)
history: LEGO Western Indians (1997) — red tribal-print shirt, black hair with two feathers, bow and black quiver.

name_th: กัปตันบริกเบียร์ด
note: หมวกของจริงเป็นแบบกะโหลก (สลับหมวกได้)
history: Captain Brickbeard from the Imperial Flagship (10210, 2010) — blue coat with pearl-gold epaulettes, orange beard, eyepatch and hook hand.

name_th: ทหารม้า (Lone Ranger)
history: Cavalry Soldier from LEGO The Lone Ranger (2013, set 79106) — dark blue jacket with gold buttons, blue kepi and rifle.

name_th: นายทหารอิมพีเรียล II (กัปตัน)
note: ของจริงถอดหมวกโชว์ผมขาว
history: Imperial Soldier II Captain from the Imperial Flagship (10210, 2010) — blue coat with white cross-belts, pearl-gold epaulettes and white legs.

name_th: นายทหารอิมพีเรียล II (ขนนกแดง)
history: Imperial Soldier II Officer from the Imperial Flagship (10210, 2010) — dark blue coat with gold braid and red sash, red epaulettes, bicorne with red plume, long moustache.

name_th: ราชาอัศวินหลวง
history: Royal Knights flagship set 6090 Royal Knight's Castle (1995) — the king is exclusive to this set, wearing the chrome-gold crown helmet.
inspiration: The lion-crested King of the Royal Knights, sovereign of the mid-90s LEGO Castle line.

name_th: ราชาอัศวินหลวง
history: Royal Knights flagship set 6090 Royal Knight's Castle (1995) — the king is exclusive to this set, wearing the chrome-gold crown helmet.
inspiration: The lion-crested King of the Royal Knights, sovereign of the mid-90s LEGO Castle line.

name_th: คิงลีโอ
history: Knights' Kingdom I (2000) — King Leo appears in 5 sets including 6098 King Leo's Castle, with gold breastplate and chrome-silver crown helmet.
inspiration: King Leo, ruler of the Lion knights and defender of the castle against Cedric the Bull.

name_th: ราชาหมากรุกดำ (วลาเด็ค)
history: Exclusive to the Knights' Kingdom II Chess Set 851499 (2005) — Vladek with scorpion breastplate, chrome-gold crown and black fabric cape as the dark side's chess king.
inspiration: The villainous Lord Vladek of Knights' Kingdom II, crowned as the black king on the chessboard.

name_th: โจรสลัดซอมบี้
history: CMF Series 14 'Monsters' (71010, 2015) — the all-Halloween wave.
inspiration: An undead buccaneer with hook hand, peg leg and tattered coat.

name_th: สาวชุดเสือ
history: CMF Series 14 'Monsters' (71010, 2015) — the all-Halloween wave.
inspiration: A fierce woman in a striped tiger costume, whip in paw.
